languages.text: Объяснил{mf||а} архмилитанту, что неравенство слуг и господ есть установленный Богом-Императором нерушимый порядок.

traits.locale_text: Объяснил{mf||а} архмилитанту, что неравенство слуг и господ есть установленный Богом-Императором нерушимый порядок.

languages.text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.

languages.text: 大軍勢に、奴隷と主人との不平等は神皇帝の絶対的な秩序の一部であると説明した。
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.

traits.locale_text: 大軍勢に、奴隷と主人との不平等は神皇帝の絶対的な秩序の一部であると説明した。

languages.text: 你向首席战士解释说，仆从和主人之间的不平等是神皇不可侵犯的秩序的一部分。
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.

traits.locale_text: 你向首席战士解释说，仆从和主人之间的不平等是神皇不可侵犯的秩序的一部分。

languages.text: Başmilitan'a, efendiler ile hizmetkârlar arasındaki eşitsizliğin Tanrı İmparator'un ihlal edilemez düzeninin bir parçası olduğunu açıkladın.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan'a, efendiler ile hizmetkârlar arasındaki eşitsizliğin Tanrı İmparator'un ihlal edilemez düzeninin bir parçası olduğunu açıkladın.

languages.text: Explicaste a tu Archimilitante que la desigualdad entre amos y sirvientes es parte del orden inviolable del Dios Emperador.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.

traits.locale_text: Explicaste a tu Archimilitante que la desigualdad entre amos y sirvientes es parte del orden inviolable del Dios Emperador.

languages.text: Vous avez expliqué à l'archimilitant que les inégalités entre serviteurs et maîtres faisaient partie de l'ordre inviolable de l'Empereur-Dieu.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez expliqué à l'archimilitant que les inégalités entre serviteurs et maîtres faisaient partie de l'ordre inviolable de l'Empereur-Dieu.

languages.text: Dem Erzmilitanten erklärt, dass die Ungleichheit zwischen Dienern und Meistern Teil der unabänderlichen Ordnung des Gottimperators ist.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that the inequality between servants and masters is part of the God-Emperor's inviolable order.
